Wrap:Colors

MODIFIED VERSION TO ALLOW HIGHLIGH TEXT ON MULTIPLE COLORS:

  • Highlighted on color red by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color orange by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color yellow by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color blue by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color green by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color purple by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color brown by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color white by Wrap Plugin
  • Highlighted on color black by Wrap Plugin

COLOR EMOJIS:

  • FILE=conf\entities.local.conf

🟥🟧🟨🟦🟩🟪🟫⬜⬛ 

(red)     🟥
(orange)  🟧
(yellow)  🟨
(blue)    🟦
(green)   🟩
(purple)  🟪
(brown)   🟫
(white)   ⬜
(black)   ⬛

DEMOS

  • <wrap :en>This text is explicitly marked as English</wrap>
  • <wrap :es>This text is explicitly marked as Spanish áéíóú - Ejemplo: camion sin tilde</wrap>

wrap status

  • danger
  • warning
  • caution
  • notice
  • safety

wrap lowercase

  • info
  • tip
  • important
  • alert
  • help
  • download
  • todo

WRAP UPPERCASE

info

tip

important

alert

help

download

todo

Back to wrap
